message:
style: apply clippy closure-to-method-reference suggestions

Convert closures to method references for cleaner code:
- `|s| s.as_str()` → `String::as_str`
- `|s| s.to_string()` → `str::to_string`
- `|| token_from_env()` → `token_from_env`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
